name: organizer_sent_agenda
description: An organizer-sent agenda is a positive event source, not an automated calendar digest

input.subject: Agenda: Q3 planning meeting on August 4
input.snippet: Please review the agenda and join us August 4 at 10:00 AM.
input.body_text: Please review the agenda before our Q3 planning meeting on August 4, 2026 from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM in Conference Room Cedar. You are expected to attend and bring your department priorities.

notes: Regression for PR 205 review feedback: organizer-sent agendas must not be rejected by the calendar-digest exclusion.
